    V

    validateJwtToken(String) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.security.JwtUtil
    Uses the bult-in validation to catch any errors with the token and uses try/catch to make custom messages based on the validation error thrown
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.pitlane.pitlane.model.Equipment.EquipmentCategory
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.pitlane.pitlane.model.Maintenance.MaintenanceType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.pitlane.pitlane.model.Equipment.EquipmentCategory
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.pitlane.pitlane.model.Maintenance.MaintenanceType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
